title: In the Air Tonight
why_this_song: In the Air Tonight by Phil Collins (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 27 times; first heard in: "I can feel it coming in the air tonight, oh, lord"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I can feel it coming in the air tonight, oh, lord"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I can feel it coming in the air tonight, oh, lord"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "And I've been waiting for this moment, for all my life, oh, lord"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Well, if you told me you were drowning"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lord" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lord" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feel" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feel" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, if you told me you were drowning
I saw it with my own two eyes

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "In the Air Tonight" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "In the Air Tonight"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Phil Collins one question about "In the Air Tonight", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Phil Collins sobre "In the Air Tonight", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "In the Air Tonight" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "In the Air Tonight" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
